all.en: From: Rachel Hsu, Engineering Manager, posted to Munich office
all.zh: 寄件人：工程經理 Rachel Hsu，將外派至慕尼黑辦公室

all.en: To: HR International Mobility Team
all.zh: 收件人：人資國際派遣團隊

all.en: Subject: Urgent — German Work Visa Status Inquiry
all.zh: 主旨：緊急 — 德國工作簽證進度查詢

all.en: Hello team, I am writing to follow up on my visa application.
all.zh: 團隊您好，來信跟進我的簽證申請進度。

all.en: My application was submitted to the German Institute on January 9.
all.zh: 我的申請已於 1 月 9 日遞交至德國在台協會。

all.en: It has now been six weeks without any update from the consulate.
all.zh: 至今已逾六週，領事館方面尚無任何更新。

all.en: My scheduled relocation date is March 1, only two weeks away.
all.zh: 我的外派啟程日為 3 月 1 日，僅剩兩週。

all.en: The Munich team has already announced my arrival to internal stakeholders.
all.zh: 慕尼黑團隊已對內部關係人公告我的到任日期。

all.en: Could someone please contact the consulate on my behalf?
all.zh: 可否請有人代我聯繫領事館詢問？

all.en: I have also enclosed my reference number for tracking purposes.
all.zh: 我也附上我的案件編號以利查詢。

all.en: The number is GDE-2026-04471 issued at the time of submission.
all.zh: 編號為 GDE-2026-04471，於送件時取得。

all.en: Reply from HR Mobility: Thank you for reaching out, Rachel.
all.zh: 人資派遣回覆：Rachel，感謝您來信。

all.en: We acknowledge the urgency of your situation and apologize for the delay.
all.zh: 我們了解情況之急迫，並對延誤致歉。

all.en: We have already escalated this matter to our Legal Affairs department.
all.zh: 我們已將此事呈報法務部門協處。

all.en: Legal will liaise directly with the consulate this afternoon.
all.zh: 法務將於今日下午直接與領事館聯繫。

all.en: Please prepare a notarized copy of your employment contract as backup.
all.zh: 請備妥您勞動契約的公證影本作為備用。

all.en: Additional proof of accommodation in Munich may also be requested.
all.zh: 可能還會要求補件慕尼黑當地住宿證明。

all.en: Our relocation partner can issue a temporary housing letter today.
all.zh: 我方派遣合作廠商今日可開立暫時住宿證明。

all.en: Update from Legal Affairs: I have just spoken with the visa officer.
all.zh: 法務部門更新：本人剛已與簽證官通話。

all.en: Your application is currently under final review by the Federal Foreign Office.
all.zh: 您的申請目前由聯邦外交部進行最後審查。

all.en: Background checks have been completed and cleared without issue.
all.zh: 背景調查已完成且無問題。

all.en: However, one supplementary document was flagged as missing.
all.zh: 惟有一份補充文件被註記為缺漏。

all.en: The consulate requires a recent certificate of company tax compliance.
all.zh: 領事館要求補附公司近期之稅務合規證明。

all.en: I will request this from Finance and submit it directly tomorrow.
all.zh: 我將向財務部索取，並於明日直接送件。

all.en: Once received, the visa should be approved within five working days.
all.zh: 送件後，簽證應於五個工作天內核准。

all.en: Please do not book any non-refundable travel arrangements yet.
all.zh: 請暫勿訂購任何不可退款的差旅安排。

all.en: Rachel's response: Thank you both for the rapid follow-up.
all.zh: Rachel 回覆：感謝兩位迅速跟進。

all.en: This is the most concrete update I have received in weeks.
all.zh: 這是我數週以來收到最具體的進度。

all.en: Should I postpone the apartment lease signing in Munich for now?
all.zh: 我是否該暫緩慕尼黑的租屋簽約？

all.en: The landlord requested a deposit by the end of this week.
all.zh: 房東要求本週內支付押金。

all.en: I would prefer not to lose the unit, but cannot risk the funds.
all.zh: 我不想失去該物件，但亦不能冒險押金損失。

all.en: HR reply: We will contact the landlord through our German agent.
all.zh: 人資回覆：我們將透過德國當地仲介聯繫房東。

all.en: A formal letter explaining the visa timeline should secure the unit.
all.zh: 由公司開立說明簽證時程的正式信函應可保留該物件。

all.en: Most German landlords accept such corporate guarantees in practice.
all.zh: 多數德國房東於實務上接受此類企業擔保。

all.en: We will copy you on all correspondence with the landlord.
all.zh: 與房東之所有往來信件皆會副本給您。

all.en: Legal update two days later: The tax compliance certificate has been delivered.
all.zh: 兩日後法務更新：稅務合規證明已遞交。

all.en: The consulate confirmed receipt and assigned a priority review code.
all.zh: 領事館已確認收件，並指派優先審查碼。

all.en: Expected decision date is February 22, six days from now.
all.zh: 預估核發日期為 2 月 22 日，距今六日。

all.en: Your passport will be returned via secure courier upon approval.
all.zh: 簽證核發後護照將以保全快遞寄回。

all.en: Please confirm your current shipping address for the courier.
all.zh: 請確認您目前可收件的地址供快遞使用。

all.en: Rachel: My address is unchanged from the application form.
all.zh: Rachel：我的地址與申請書所填一致未變更。

all.en: I will be working from home next week to receive the documents.
all.zh: 我下週將在家辦公以便收件。

all.en: Could HR also confirm my flight booking can now proceed?
all.zh: 人資是否可確認現在可進行訂機票？

all.en: I would like to depart Taipei on the evening of February 28.
all.zh: 我希望 2 月 28 日傍晚自台北啟程。

all.en: HR final update: Visa approved and passport dispatched this morning.
all.zh: 人資最終更新：簽證已核准，護照今晨已寄出。

all.en: Tracking number for the courier package is SF-887412035TW.
all.zh: 快遞包裹追蹤碼為 SF-887412035TW。

all.en: Delivery is expected by tomorrow before 18:00.
all.zh: 預計明日 18:00 前送達。

all.en: Please proceed with flight booking through our corporate travel desk.
all.zh: 請透過企業差旅組進行訂機票。

all.en: We have also arranged airport pickup in Munich on March 1.
all.zh: 我們亦已安排 3 月 1 日於慕尼黑接機。

all.en: Your first-week orientation schedule has been emailed separately.
all.zh: 您首週的職前訓練行程已另以郵件寄送。

all.en: The Munich office welcomes you and looks forward to your arrival.
all.zh: 慕尼黑辦公室歡迎您，期待您的到任。

all.en: Rachel: Thank you everyone for the diligent coordination.
all.zh: Rachel：感謝各位的細心協調。

all.en: This experience confirms how vital cross-functional teamwork can be.
all.zh: 此次經驗印證了跨部門合作之重要性。

all.en: I will provide feedback for the relocation handbook upon settling in.
all.zh: 待我安頓後，會提供回饋以更新派遣手冊。

all.en: Case closed; relocation file archived under reference MOB-2026-018.
all.zh: 案件結案；派遣檔案歸檔編號 MOB-2026-018。
